playbook.intent: One interview executed with a structured guide, recording and transcript stored, 5-10 atomic insights tagged into a JTBD or opportunity tree within 24 hours.
playbook.scope: One interview executed with a structured guide, recording and transcript stored, 5-10 atomic insights tagged into a JTBD or opportunity tree within 24 hours.

stage.name: Prep
stage.intent: Walk into the interview with a single focused goal.

tasks.task: Write one research question the session must answer
Draft a 5-question guide with follow-up probes

stage.decision-gate: Advance when goal fits on a single line and the guide has follow-up probes.

stage.name: Recruit + confirm
stage.intent: Make sure the participant matches the segment and shows up.

tasks.task: Verify the participant matches the target segment
Send the consent + recording note 24h ahead

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the participant has confirmed and consented in writing.

stage.name: Run
stage.intent: Run the session as discovery, not sales.

tasks.task: Open with the participant's recent past, not your product
Probe with 'tell me about the last time…'

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the session ends with the participant having spoken more than the PM.

stage.name: Tag insights
stage.intent: Convert raw transcript into atomic, taggable insights.

tasks.task: Extract 5-10 atomic insights (one fact per line)
Tag each insight against JTBD and the opportunity tree
File any product-affecting insight into the backlog

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every insight is one fact (no compound claims).

stage.name: Decide next cohort
stage.intent: Use the insight pattern to pick who you talk to next.

tasks.task: Pick one segment to recruit next
Adjust the guide if a saturation pattern is emerging

stage.decision-gate: Required: an explicit next-cohort decision (continue, switch, saturate).

extra.value: {human: faion get-content user-interview-prep-run --format md, agent: faion get-content user-interview-prep-run --format context, json: faion get-content user-interview-prep-run --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
